title: S3eed PlayButtons
description: Adds 2 new Play Buttons To The Game With The Name S3eed
body:
## **🎉 This Resource Pack Adds 2 New Play Buttons 🎉**


---
## _**🎮 How to Install:**_

Download the pack (.zip file).

Move it to your resourcepacks folder.

Enable it in Minecraft Settings > Resource Packs.

---

<details>
<summary>50K PlayButton</summary>

![Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/14791cd1432d62eecbc392051d1031fabe71db28.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>100K PlayButton</summary>

![Crafting](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b590f85baf632d893366b46d38dd05a9aec70547.png)

</details>

## ⛔ Dont Place it on the ground it wont work
## ✅ place it on a item frame
